title: Server state drilled 3+ levels must move to vue-query (or Pinia)
guideline: Data fetched in onMounted/watchEffect and stored in a ref, then passed down 3 or more component levels as props, is server state being hand-carried through the tree. Move the fetch into @tanstack/vue-query's useQuery (or Nuxt useFetch/useAsyncData, or a Pinia store) and read it in the component that actually uses it. Intermediate components must not know about the data at all.

rule.message: server state must not be prop-drilled; fetch it with vue-query where it is used

title: A ref mutated from below and shared across branches must use provide/inject
guideline: When a ref is passed down as a prop AND children mutate it from below (v-model on a child component, or @event handlers assigning it), with the value fanning out to 2+ child branches, the intent is a global change: one component updates, distant parts react. Use provide/inject (or a Pinia store) instead of threading value+events through the tree.

rule.message: shared mutable state must live in provide/inject (or a Pinia store), not travel as v-model/event props

title: No event relayed upward through 2+ component levels
guideline: A child event re-emitted verbatim at each level (`@save="$emit('save', $event)"`) is the upward mirror of prop drilling: every intermediate is coupled to an event it doesn't handle. Put v-model at the level that owns the state, provide a callback via provide/inject, or move the state to a Pinia store so the deep component mutates it directly.

rule.message: event relayed through 2+ levels; own the state at the right level (v-model there, provide/inject, or a store)

title: No prop drilling deeper than 2 levels
guideline: A value passed through 3+ component boundaries, where the intermediates only forward it, couples the whole path to that prop. Restructure: slots (pass the rendered content instead of the data), provide/inject, or a Pinia store — depending on what the value is.

rule.message: prop drilled through 3+ component levels; restructure with slots, provide/inject, or a store
